title: Kystes' Spine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Spine}}
[[File:Kystes_Spine_SOF.png|thumb|right|250px|Kystes' Spine]]
The '''Kystes' Spine''' was a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] range on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] that bisected the southern continent [[Aximia]]. The range was named for [[Kystes]], and the majority of Talus's [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] population, including the [[Kurtuln Den]], lived within the volcanic tunnels and caves beneath the mountains. The mountains were nearly impassable and were home to a number of deadly native creatures, and were prone to violent storms and [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquakes]] as well. Vast forests, shrouded in mist and clouds, stretch across the foothills of the range.
